title: api usage and cost recording
goal: OpenAI と Claude の usage を記録し、session report で AI API コストを可視化する
constraints: must record usage without changing provider decision flow
must tolerate missing usage data gracefully
report extension must be backward-compatible where possible
provider-side changes are allowed only if existing provider responses do not already expose usage metadata
allowed_changes_detail: orchestration/run_session.py: usage collection, api call counting, and report persistence only
orchestration/providers/openai_client.py: expose usage metadata only if current return structure does not already expose it
orchestration/providers/anthropic_client.py: expose usage metadata only if current return structure does not already expose it
